top_signals.title: Big Tech software era is over, says top investor James Anderson
top_signals.summary: Former Baillie Gifford fund manager says spoils of AI war will flow to hardware suppliers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Quadria-Backed Aragen Life Said to Plan $300 Million India IPO
top_signals.summary: Aragen Life Sciences Ltd., a contract research and manufacturing firm, is considering an initial public offering in Mumbai that could raise as much as $300 million, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
